headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on NextEra Energy, Raises Price Target to $107
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Nicholas Amicucci   maintains NextEra Energy (NYSE:NEE) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $97 to $107.

raw.headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on NextEra Energy, Raises Price Target to $107

headline: NextEra Energy to meet with investors throughout May and June
summary: NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NEE) today announced that members of the senior management team will participate in various investor meetings throughout May and June to discuss, among other things, long-term growth-rate expectations, reaffirming those presented on the April 23, 2026, first-quarter financial results call. Investors and other interested parties can access a copy of the most recent presentation materials at www.NextEraEnergy.com/investors.
